title: lamium orvala
intro: Lamium orvala, also known as Spurred Viper's Bugloss, is a flowering plant species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, offering various health benefits such as soothing digestive discomfort, easing coughs, and reducing inflammation. Lamium orvala is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
